quality.rationale: 纯张量指标对称化与反对称化的代数证明，逻辑完整但缺乏具体物理场景应用

origin.question:
Problem 3.18. Show for any two-index tensor $\mathbf{X}$ , that $\mathbf{X}_{\alpha  eta} = \mathbf{X}_{(\alpha  eta)} + \mathbf{X}_{[\alpha  eta]}$ where ( ) and [ ] denote symmetrization and antisymmetrization, respectively. Show that in general
$$
\mathbf {Y}_{\alpha  eta \gamma} 
eq \mathbf {Y}_{(a  eta \gamma)} + \mathbf {Y}_{[ a  eta \gamma ]}.
$$
origin.answer: 对于二阶张量，分解恒成立：$\mathbf{X}_{\alpha \beta} = \mathbf{X}_{(\alpha \beta)} + \mathbf{X}_{[\alpha \beta]}$；对于三阶张量，该简单对称/反对称叠加一般不成立，即 $\mathbf{Y}_{\alpha \beta \gamma} \neq \mathbf{Y}_{(\alpha \beta \gamma)} + \mathbf{Y}_{[\alpha \beta \gamma]}$。
origin.solution:
Solution 3.18. The first part is straightforward:
$$
\mathbf {X}_{\alpha  eta} =  rac {1}{2} \left(\mathbf {X}_{\alpha  eta} + \mathbf {X}_{ eta \alpha}ight) +  rac {1}{2} \left(\mathbf {X}_{\alpha  eta} - \mathbf {X}_{ eta \alpha}ight) = \mathbf {X}_{(\alpha  eta)} + \mathbf {X}_{[ \alpha  eta ]}.
$$
If a similar relation,
$$
\mathbf {Y}_{a  eta \gamma} = \mathbf {Y}_{(a  eta \gamma)} + \mathbf {Y}_{[ a  eta \gamma ]}, 	ag {1}
$$
were true for a $3^{\mathrm{rd}}$ rank tensor, we would have:
$$
\mathrm {Y}_{ eta a \gamma} = \mathrm {Y}_{( eta a \gamma)} + \mathrm {Y}_{[  eta a \gamma ]} = \mathrm {Y}_{(a  eta \gamma)} - \mathrm {Y}_{[ a  eta \gamma ]}
$$
$$
\mathbf {Y}_{ eta \gamma a} = \mathbf {Y}_{(\gamma  eta a)} - \mathbf {Y}_{[ \gamma  eta a ]} = \mathbf {Y}_{(a  eta \gamma)} + \mathbf {Y}_{[ a  eta \gamma ]} = \mathbf {Y}_{a  eta \gamma}. 	ag {2}
$$
Since $\mathbf{Y}_{\alpha  eta \gamma}$ does not in general have the symmetry properties implied by Equation (2), the simple decomposition in Equation (1) cannot be correct.
